task_description: Address critical build issues to ensure deployment safety, focusing exclusively on ISO size constraints.

deliverables.description: Add ISO size validation (must be < 2 GiB) to the `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` CI pipeline.
Create a new verification script `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` to validate that size optimization settings (compression, NoExtract) are present in the build configuration.

constraints: Limit to the single coherent deliverable of implementing ISO size validation.
Do not attempt to fix the `pacman.conf` database issue, as it is already resolved.
Do not make changes to `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` beyond adding the size validation step.
Ensure the `tests/verify_iso_size.sh` script exits cleanly and follows project testing conventions.
